sentence: A glazed bronut entering their sope opera is still the person you call when everything falls apart.

wombos.definition: A phase or period in which someone suddenly develops and aggressively expresses strong opinions about everything. A riff on 'soap opera' — dramatic, ongoing, opinion-heavy.

A best friend who is effortlessly cool and completely unbothered. 'Glazing' means obsessively complimenting someone; 'unfazed' means nothing rattles them. A glazed bronut is your chill, beloved, unshakeable ride-or-die.
